gt_world_add.description: Add world and assign a channel

options.kanal: Channel where this world's reports will be posted

options.lista: Player nicknames, separated by commas or new lines

options.data: Report date: DD.MM or DD.MM.YYYY (defaults to today if omitted)

options.okres: Time window to include (default: all time)

gt_absent_add.description: Add single absence to a member

options.data: Report date: DD.MM or DD.MM.YYYY (defaults to today)

gt_reports_wipe.description: Delete reports for one world — either by exact date or by age

options.data: Exact battle date to delete (DD.MM[.YYYY]). Omit to delete reports older than 3 days.

gt_absent_delete.description: Delete single absence for a member

gt_wipe.description: Clearing every absence report (this server only)

gt_setup.description: Run the one-time server configuration wizard (admin only).

gt_setup_reset.description: Unlock configuration so /gt_setup can be run again (admin only).

gt_ranking_set.description: Configure or disable the automatic weekly absence ranking for one world

options.enabled: Turn the automatic weekly ranking on or off for this world
options.weekday: Day of the week to post it (only used if enabled)

gt_ranking_status.description: Show the current automatic ranking schedule

options.swiat: Show only this world's schedule (omit to list every world)

gt_setup_settings.description: Change a single server setting without resetting everything (admin only).

gt_block_image.description: Manually add an image to the scam blocklist

options.reason: Why this image is being blocked (optional)

gt_blocklist_stats.description: Show how many images are in the scam hash blocklist

gt_events_setup.description: Set the channel where official game event webhooks arrive (admin only).

options.channel: The channel that receives official game news/event webhooks

gt_events_toggle.description: Enable or disable the SF events tracking module (admin only).

options.state: True to enable, False to disable

gt_events_reload.description: Re-scan the events channel history and reload the event schedule (admin only).

events.description: Show current and upcoming in-game events for this weekend.

gt_recruitment_panel.description: Post the guild recruitment application panel (admin only).

options.channel: Channel to post the recruitment panel in
options.officer_role: Role that can review and decide on applications
options.member_role: Optional: role automatically given to accepted applicants
options.member_role_2: Optional: additional rank given to accepted applicants
options.member_role_3: Optional: additional rank given to accepted applicants
options.member_role_4: Optional: additional rank given to accepted applicants

gt_attack_setup.description: Configure the alert channel and ping role for a world's attack notifications.

options.channel: Channel where attack alerts for this world will be posted
options.ping_role: Role to ping when an attack alert is triggered for this world

attack.description: Trigger a guild attack for a specific world.

options.time: Attack time, e.g. 20:00 (omit for an immediate 'happening now' alert)
